step.title: Cleaning up temp folders from previous zip deployments and extracting pushed zip file /tmp/zipdeploy/99d12230-a773-4c81-b67c-a391382eea96.zip (91.53 MB) to /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted
ChmodRecursive Process exited with total time taken in ms: 365
Executing external process
step.arguments: -c "oryx build /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted -o /home/site/wwwroot --platform nodejs --platform-version 18 -p virtualenv_name= --log-file /tmp/build-debug.log -i /tmp/8de94a426770da5 -p compress_node_modules=tar-gz | tee /tmp/oryx-build.log ; exit $PIPESTATUS "
